operational_knowledge_units.title: RMS robot control screen is referenced for unplanned restart verification
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide references logging into RMS and confirming that the robot control screen loads before UPS removes the master estop during an unplanned restart.
observed_evidence: Visible text: 'Log into RMS and confirm the screen loads before having UPS remove the master estop'
Visible text includes RMS URL ending in '/monitor/robotControl'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Services unplanned restart guidance references RMS robotControl screen verification. User should log into RMS and confirm the screen loads before UPS removes the master estop. URL shown: fortna-rms-primary.txrth.otnet.ups.com/static/rms/#/monitor/robotControl.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Verify RMS robot control screen before master estop removal during unplanned restart
preconditions: UPS is prepared to remove the master estop after confirmation
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide titled 'Services / Unplanned restart' states to log into RMS and confirm the screen loads before having UPS remove the master estop. The RMS robotControl URL is shown.

steps.instruction: Log into RMS and navigate to the robot control screen shown on the slide.
steps.expected_outcome: The RMS robot control screen is opened or attempting to load.
steps.validation_check: Confirm the target RMS screen is reached.
steps.visual_region_hint: Center text region containing 'Log into RMS' and the displayed robotControl URL.

steps.instruction: Confirm that the screen loads before having UPS remove the master estop.
steps.expected_outcome: The RMS screen has loaded prior to master estop removal.
steps.validation_check: Verify the screen is loaded before UPS proceeds with master estop removal.
steps.visual_region_hint: Center text region containing 'confirm the screen loads before having UPS remove the master estop'.

procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Unplanned restart check: log into RMS, open the robotControl screen, and confirm the screen loads before UPS removes the master estop.
